summary: Comprehensive testing of admin login fix, admin dashboard, and lead generation website. All backend API tests passed (17/17). All frontend E2E tests passed (33/33). Admin login 'body stream already read' error has been fixed - login works correctly.

issues: Newsletter popup appears after 5 seconds on every page - may interfere with user actions if not dismissed

seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend API tests (leads, quotes, newsletter subscriptions) are cleaned up automatically via fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests pass. Admin auth flow fully tested including login with correct/wrong credentials, token validation, logout, and session persistence. Admin dashboard tested with all tabs (Overview, Leads, Quotes, Newsletter) including filtering and search functionality. Homepage and navigation tested including all pages, dark mode toggle, and lead capture modals. Newsletter popup automatically shows after 5 seconds - tests set localStorage key 'newsletterPopupDismissed' to prevent it from appearing during tests.
features_tested: Admin login error handling (wrong password, unauthorized email)
Admin token validation stored in localStorage
Admin dashboard overview with stats (Total Leads, New Leads, Quote Requests, Converted)
Admin dashboard tab navigation (Overview, Leads, Quotes, Newsletter)
Admin dashboard leads filtering by status
Navigation links to all pages (About, Services, Pricing, Contact, Blog, FAQ, Portfolio, Quote, Booking)
Lead capture modal from hero and navbar Get Started buttons
Backend API endpoints: GET/POST /api/leads/, GET/POST /api/quotes/, GET/POST /api/newsletter/subscribe, POST /api/admin/login, POST /api/admin/validate-token, POST /api/admin/logout
